tbox.st: Concurrent Resolution Directing PEHP to Establish the Weight Management and Obesity Pilot Program

lt.gd: This resolution directs the Public Employees' Benefit Insurance Program to establish the Weight Management and Obesity Pilot Program.
lt.hp: This resolution:recognizes the existing bariatric surgery pilot program within the Public Employees' Benefit Insurance Program (PEHP); anddirects PEHP to establish a new Weight Management and Obesity Pilot Program that combines the bariatric surgery pilot program with an option for GLP-1 coverage.

leg.enact: Be it resolved by the Legislature of the state of Utah, the Governor concurring therein:
